# Error Handling Checklist: PR Blast-Radius Review Action

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality for cache failures, unavailable analysis, delivery degradation, threshold distinction, narrative degradation, and rerun/comment recovery.
**Created**: 2026-07-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md), [data-model.md](../data-model.md), [contracts/result-matrix.md](../contracts/result-matrix.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are cache miss, stale cache, corrupt cache, incompatible cache, rebuild path, and unrecoverable cache failure all documented? [Completeness, Spec FR-013-FR-015, FR-027-FR-029, Data Model CacheValidationResult]
- [x] CHK002 Are clean, ordinary impact, threshold breach, unavailable analysis, delivery unavailable, and narrative unavailable outcomes represented in the result matrix? [Completeness, Spec FR-019, FR-040-FR-047]
- [x] CHK003 Are comment permission denial, deleted sticky comment, duplicate markers, and rerun identity handled as distinct requirements? [Completeness, Spec FR-034-FR-039]
- [x] CHK004 Are artifact and summary delivery failure consequences defined when comment delivery is unavailable? [Completeness, Spec FR-006, FR-039, FR-045]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Is analysis unavailability clearly separated from report-delivery unavailability? [Clarity, Spec FR-007, FR-039, FR-045]
- [x] CHK006 Is threshold breach clearly separated from infrastructure or delivery failure? [Clarity, Spec FR-008-FR-011, FR-041-FR-045]
- [x] CHK007 Is narrative failure clearly non-blocking when deterministic analysis and durable delivery succeed? [Clarity, Spec FR-046-FR-047]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK008 Do success criteria align with failing explicitly for unavailable analysis and failing explicitly for total report-delivery loss? [Consistency, Spec SC-005, SC-014]
- [x] CHK009 Do fallback requirements preserve the deterministic report instead of replacing it with logs-only delivery? [Consistency, Spec FR-006, Assumptions]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK010 Are recovery paths defined for invalid cache before analysis begins? [Coverage, Data Model CacheValidationResult]
- [x] CHK011 Are partial-success paths covered where analysis succeeds but privileged delivery or narrative does not? [Coverage, Spec US2, FR-039, FR-046-FR-047]
- [x] CHK012 Are result-to-conclusion requirements measurable through fixtures rather than prose interpretation alone? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-014, Contract result-matrix]
